name: Helio Governance
description: Routes OpenClaw tool calls and installs through Helio's policy sideband for allow/deny/approval/limit decisions and audit. Fail-closed: if Helio is unreachable, tool calls are blocked.

helioBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the Helio governance sideband.

tokenEnv.description: Name of the environment variable holding the adapter bearer token. Never the SDK token.

origin.description: Origin string reported to Helio for audit attribution.

evaluateTimeoutMs.description: Bounded timeout for POST /evaluate. On timeout the tool call fails closed (blocked).
